title: Bacteria nowcast beats station-memory status quo
headline: AP 0.4992 vs 0.2782 · dAP +0.221
plain: On the EXCLUDE_SAN_DIEGO 2022+ deployable stratum, the calibrated bacteria model beats the station-memory baseline with a clustered-bootstrap AP margin whose CI excludes zero.

title: Harmonic tide-range claim card is blocked by source-data gaps
headline: DATA-GAP
plain: The current tide-range card is not promoted as a positive claim because the harmonic-range cache and beach-to-gauge map are not materialized.

title: Clean-to-dirty beach surprise reframe passes retrospective gate
headline: AP 0.4177 vs station-memory 0.199
plain: Among currently-clean beach-days, the frozen statewide model predicts clean-to-dirty exceedance surprises far better than station memory.

title: Adaptive sampling replay beats site-memory sampling
headline: top-20 capture 0.7062 vs 0.5299
plain: Under the same sampling budget, model-ranked sampling catches more exceedances than station-memory ranking in retrospective replay.

title: Bacteria breakthrough gate is retrospective-pass, prospective-blocked
headline: PASS · BLOCKED_PROSPECTIVE_LOCKBOX
plain: The operational, onset, and spatial checks pass retrospectively, but the final breakthrough label is blocked by an empty prospective lockbox.

title: CatBoost has a real ranking edge over frozen HGBT
headline: AP 0.5164 vs 0.5082 · CI [0.0041, 0.0193]
plain: The CatBoost champion-upgrade candidate beats the frozen HGBT ranking metric with a clustered-bootstrap margin that excludes zero.

title: LightGBM and CatBoost both clear the paired HGBT test
headline: CatBoost +0.0132; LightGBM +0.0081
plain: Two independent tree learners beat frozen HGBT in paired AP tests, confirming the model ceiling is slightly above the old HGBT run.

title: Frozen bacteria model passes held-from-fitting 2026 season
headline: AP 0.6335 vs station-memory 0.3682
plain: On the locked 2026-01-05 to 2026-03-05 held-from-fitting season, the frozen model beats the strongest baseline and retains discrimination.

title: Bacteria forecast horizon is honest to about 2 days
headline: skill over station-memory through lead 2d; lead 3d loses
plain: The corrected horizon claim compares against a multi-feature station-memory model, not the weak single-bit persistence baseline.

title: Deployable bacteria advisory rule catches most exceedances
headline: recall 0.8645 · precision 0.2301
plain: The calibrated decision rule turns the model into an advisory threshold chosen on validation, then read on the 2022+ test era.

title: Russian River upstream turbidity adds lead-2 skill
headline: dAP +0.0489 vs persistence
plain: Upstream turbidity plus downstream persistence beats downstream persistence alone for the Guerneville intake turbidity event target.

title: Cache Slough upstream lead sweep finds one new escape
headline: dAP +0.1075 at lead 1d
plain: A systematic USGS-IV upstream/downstream sweep found one new turbidity advection escape beyond the Russian River positive control.

title: Drivers matter on wet-tail bacteria extremes
headline: wet-tail AP gain +0.0596
plain: Although drivers do not improve the pooled mean, they add strong, CI-separated skill on the wet/storm high-consequence tail.

title: GRU sequence model beats HGBT at 14-28 day hypoxia lead
headline: 14d dAP +0.0281; 28d +0.0327
plain: A genuine temporal GRU extracts multi-week hypoxia lead dynamics that the stratification HGBT misses at 14 and 28 days.

title: Hypoxia onset forecast beats better naive across horizons
headline: 7d AP 0.835 vs naive 0.7474
plain: On the currently-non-hypoxic origins, the stratification model beats the better seasonal/DO-proximity naive for 3-28 day onset windows.

title: Tokyo Bay shadow probe finds multiple positive physical targets
headline: 7 positive probe rows
plain: The Tokyo Bay lakehouse/shadow probe finds positive signals for haline stratification, surface chlorophyll, and low-bottom-oxygen targets.

title: Tokyo Bay GPU miner finds bottom-chlorophyll signal
headline: high_bottom_chl_p90 neural AP 0.4195
plain: A GRU temporal multi-target classifier found a positive high-bottom-chlorophyll target signal in the Tokyo Bay test bed.

title: mcyE genotype-to-toxin effect definitively replicates in Alberta
headline: rho 0.6824 · n=1461 · 55 lakes
plain: The toxic-genotype signal predicts microcystin beyond biomass across 55 lakes and 5 years in an independent Alberta bloom-monitoring corpus.

title: mcyE genotype-to-toxin effect replicates nationally
headline: rho 0.4423 · perm-p 0.0024
plain: A national WQP paired corpus confirms mcyE absolute predicts microcystin beyond biomass across independent lakes and years.

title: National microcystin driver-null holds
headline: met dAP -0.007 LOYO
plain: Adding antecedent meteorology to history+season does not improve national in-situ microcystin toxin forecasts.

title: Domoic-acid toxic-onset forecast clears the scoped gate
headline: onset AP 0.1347 vs seasonal_naive 0.0259
plain: The updated domoic-acid result is strongest on the decision-relevant toxic-onset slice: prior-clean pier visits where persistence is degenerate.

title: Cyano onset has a scoped cold-start phenology law
headline: lat-quad skill 0.2018 CI [0.0442, 0.3151]
plain: Latitude/quadratic geography gives a real cold-start cyanobacteria bloom-onset timing prior under held-out state, lat-band, and year tests.

title: Daily freshwater cyano interlingua still does not beat seasonality
headline: pi AP 0.4155 vs calendar 0.4242
plain: Daily meteorology narrows the freshwater cyano interlingua gap but does not flip the prior null: physics π features do not separate from calendar or persistence on held-out lakes.

title: EU annual bathing-water transfer exposes an interlingua boundary
headline: BOUNDARY-EU-specific
plain: The donor π signal survives annual coarsening, but it still does not outrank calendar plus site-memory on held-out EU coasts, so the manifold does not generalize to annual EU bathing-water classes.

title: ddPCR-positive/culture-safe days are mostly a persistence artifact
headline: raw lift 0.2121; controlled dAUC 0.0147
plain: Same-day ddPCR positives among culture-safe San Diego beach-days have raw forward culture-exceedance lift, but ddPCR does not add clean signal after full culture-memory controls.

title: SoG Central relief-onset transfer auto-rejects as underpowered
headline: 4 events < gate 8
plain: The pre-registered Saanich-to-SoG relief-onset transfer test does not fit a model because SoG Central has too few locked-definition deep-oxygen relief onsets.

title: Semantic shadow refresh produced discovery leads, not claims
headline: 25 targets · 4632 correlations
plain: The universal shadow-lakehouse refresh found cross-domain correlations and temporal-holdout model lifts, but they remain discovery leads until independently reproduced.

title: Rupture half-duration can reduce tsunami false alarms at fixed recall
headline: 39.1% fewer false alarms at 80% recall
plain: Adding rupture half-duration to magnitude+depth reduces false alarms in the NOAA tsunami label screen at 80% and 90% fixed recall, but not at 95% recall.

title: CARTE-style shared-plane benchmark adds bacteria ranking signal
headline: numeric-only AUC 0.7613 vs raw 0.7163
plain: A CARTE-style tabular shared-plane benchmark improves held-out bacteria ranking over raw and fair-ID baselines in the small pilot/critic read.

title: Soil-moisture bacteria signal survives a shuffle null
headline: observed dAP +0.0141 > null max 0.0074
plain: The soil-moisture feature lift is genuine under the source-gate permutation test, but later operational reads say it is mostly redundant with discharge.

title: New-source bacteria gate has multiple KEEP candidates
headline: 3 KEEP candidates; best dAP +0.0171
plain: The new-source signal gate found several small but positive bacteria feature candidates before stricter operational redundancy checks.

title: 10-hour findings campaign rerun is mostly complete
headline: 5 keep · 5 null/refutation · 0 pending
plain: Fresh dry-onset outputs now synthesize into the final evidence ledger; no declared outputs are missing in the current ledger.

title: Targeted bacteria L2 gate keeps residual signals
headline: 3 L2 KEEP: nbr_and_latlon, latlon, waves
plain: The narrowed bacteria L2/L3 rerun keeps neighborhood-plus-location, location, and waves over the established FEATS+rain baseline.

title: Dry-onset interaction scan finds only a weak inspect-before-ship hit
headline: dAP +0.0054; 0 FWER survivors
plain: One discharge-by-precipitation interaction adds a small onset-slice AP lift in the tree A/B read, but the broader interaction screen does not clear the permutation family-wise error gate.

title: Dry-onset symbolic search stays null after FDR
headline: 1,200,000 formulas · 0 FDR survivors
plain: The symbolic rerun found training-skill formulas, but none survived out-of-time onset residual FDR, so it does not create a new bacteria driver.

title: Cross-domain serendipity couplings have two supported rows
headline: 2 supported couplings
plain: The gated cross-domain search found two supported couplings over target memory+season baselines.

title: H1 trust index tracks promoted claims and nulls
headline: 57 signals · 43 experiments
plain: The trust-layer index is the broader source that the public page was missing: it joins promoted claims, logged nulls, and frozen headline integrity.

title: Estate-wide GPU signal search finds no new bacteria carrier
headline: 474,825 interactions + 3M formulas + knockoffs: zero shippable survivors
plain: A large GPU search over nonlinear interactions and symbolic forms did not find a new bacteria signal beyond the frozen baseline.

title: Western Lake Erie loading does not break the microcystin driver-null
headline: loading dAP -0.028; national met dAP -0.007
plain: Even in the canonical nutrient-driven Erie system, tributary loading does not add station-level microcystin forecast skill once history and season are controlled.
